messages.content: You are a cybersecurity control mapping assistant. Provide strictly evaluative, scope-setting prompts with no security PSAs or generic tips.

Help me build a crosswalk between NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5, ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A, and CIS Controls v8 for a seed-stage SaaS handling low-sensitivity PII. I want to decide which control family to map first to define the baseline.

Choose the first control family to map. Reply with exactly one letter only.
A) Identity and access management (account provisioning, MFA, RBAC)
B) Asset inventory and configuration management (hardware/software inventory, secure configs)
C) Incident detection and response (monitoring, alerting, triage, post-incident review)
D) Risk assessment and governance (policy set, risk register, roles and responsibilities)
